'''Crutag''' was a [[Taloron Hunters|Taloron Hunter]], both fierce and determined. He was known to boast that he never failed to capture his [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] targets. He considered [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to be vastly overrated. Working together with fellow [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunters]] [[Slizzik]] and [[Slimego]], Crutag once pursued a band of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Agent/Legends|agents]] who had a bounty on their heads. Crutag attacked their ship while it approached [[Trinta]], causing it to crash-land on the swamp [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. [[Halagad Ventor]], however, used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to prevent both Crutag and the rebels from leaving the planet.

==Biography==
After the resolution of the Taloron Pirate Confllict, Crutag, a Taloron Hunter<ref name="CAV2 ">''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Two]]''</ref> and a veteran of the [[Taloron Pirate Conflict]] joined the [[Ragnar Syndicate]],<ref name="CAV2 " /> a member house of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]],<ref name="GG10 ">''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''</ref> basing his operations in the [[Merel sector/Legends|Merel sector]]. When fellow Ragnar hunter [[Noval Garaint]] framed Crutag for a crime Garaint had himself committed, the Taloron left Ragnar to hunt solo.<ref name="CAV2 " />

Crutag cultivated a reputation as a formidable hunter, boasting that he had never failed to apprehend a target. In reality, he was only adequate for the job, but his reputation was one of single-minded determination and violent cruelty. He gathered a cadre of assistant hunters and acquired the Taloron Prey Chaser the ''[[Scent of Fear]]''. Crutag's crew was diverse, and at one point included a [[Unidentified Taloron lieutenant|Taloron lieutenant]], but this individual died on a hunt.<ref name="CAV2 " /> Although he publicly professed loyalty to only himself, Crutag believed that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was the rightful government of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="CAV2 " />

At some point during the Galactic Civil War, Crutag learned of a bounty on a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operatives: 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] dead, 20,000 alive.<ref name="CAV2 " /> The Taloron encountered the Rebels at [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]] and gave chase, but they escaped by stealing a ship. Knowing that they would soon need to resupply, Crutag surmised that the Rebels would flee to the nearby planet [[Trinta]] and traveled there with a crew of 20 minions in his ship, the ''[[Scent of Fear]]'', to ambush the group.<ref name="DOE">''[[Domain of Evil]]''</ref> In the world's [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], Crutag attempted to disable the Rebels' ship, but he broke off pursuit when they entered the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] and reached the level of the world's forests. As the Rebels crash-landed, Crutag and his crew landed safely.<ref name="DOE" /> Once on Trinta's marshy surface, Crutag sent his minions to search for the Alliance operatives. However, they encountered strange apparitions—unbeknownst to them, [[Mind trick/Legends|Force illusions]] created by the fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Halagad Ventor]]. From these frightful encounters, Crutag lost several of his underling. When the ''Scent of Fear'' apparently disappeared—hidden by Ventor's use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]—Crutag set off with eight assistants to find the Rebels himself.<ref name="DOE" />

Crutag did not realize that he had come to the attention of Ventor, who wanted to seduce and corrupt the Taloron so that Ventor could use the hunter's power and vitality for his own ends. Accordingly, Ventor arranged for Crutag to finally encounter the Rebels in what he hoped would be a fight that would lead to Crutag's triumph and another step toward his corruption to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. Crutag finally caught up to the Rebels on one of Trinta's islands. He blamed his quarry for killing his crew and for stealing his ship, but he was puzzled about why the Rebels had not used the ''Scent of Fear'' to escape the world.<ref name="DOE" /> Nevertheless, the Rebels managed to escape the Taloron Hunter.<ref name="DOE" />
